title: Progress Reports
description: A calm place to review daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly progress without comparison or pressure.
placeholderDescription: This reporting view is reserved for the Sprint 5 reporting workflow.

daily.title: Daily Reports
daily.description: Review worship completion, XP, streak progress, and daily consistency.

weekly.title: Weekly Reports
weekly.description: Follow weekly completion, mentor feedback, and progress trends.

monthly.title: Monthly Reports
monthly.description: Compare monthly consistency, XP growth, missions, and worship balance.

yearly.title: Yearly Reports
yearly.description: See long-term streaks, achievements, and yearly journey milestones.

weekly.title: Weekly Progress Report
weekly.description: Review the most recent closed week and move through historical weekly reports.

breakdown.title: Worship Breakdown
breakdown.description: Completion by worship item for this closed week.
breakdown.noMatchesDescription: Try another search term to find a worship item in this report.
breakdown.emptyDescription: This weekly report did not include worship item activity.

viewedUser.personalDescription: You are viewing your own weekly progress.

comparison.title: Compared With Previous Week
comparison.description: Only the delta from the previous week is shown.

userSearch.title: View another user
userSearch.description: Search within the users you are allowed to review.
userSearch.label: User

states.weekNotClosedTitle: This week is not closed yet
states.weekNotClosedDescription: Check back after the week ends. Reopened weeks keep their report frozen only if one was already generated.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to view this user's weekly report.
states.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading this report.

breakdown.title: Worship Breakdown
breakdown.description: Completion by worship item for this report period.
breakdown.emptyDescription: This report does not include worship item activity yet.
breakdown.noMatchesDescription: Try another search term to find a worship item in this report.

rewards.title: Rewards earned
rewards.emptyDescription: Badges, achievements, and completed missions will appear here.

daily.title: Daily Worship Report
daily.description: Review a single day score, completion, rewards, missions, and worship breakdown.

states.emptyDescription: Once daily worship is saved, the report will show score, rewards, and breakdown here.
states.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading this daily report.

daily.statusDescription: A focused view of this day score, rewards, notes, and worship details.

insights.rewardsHint: Badges, achievements, and missions earned today.
insights.noNotes: No notes were added for this day.

monthly.title: Monthly Progress Report
monthly.description: Review monthly consistency, worship score, rewards, completed missions, and strongest or weakest days.
monthly.monthSummary: Monthly totals from worship, badges, achievements, and missions.

states.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading this monthly report.

calendar.title: Monthly Calendar
calendar.description: Each day shows score, completion, and activity intensity for the selected month.
calendar.emptyDescription: Daily report cards will appear here after tracking is saved.
